description: Automattic is the company behind WordPress.com and related WordPress products and services. Its public developer documentation on developer.wordpress.com covers APIs, AI agent connectivity, and command-line tools for building on and managing WordPress.com.
summary: Automattic publicly exposes WordPress.com developer surfaces: a WordPress.com REST API, a WordPress.com MCP server for AI agents, and CLI tooling including Studio CLI and WP-CLI integration docs.
